caption: The video begins with a wide shot of a stadium at night, featuring rows of red seating and a large screen displaying a soccer match score of "1-2" between Granada CF and Real Madrid. The screen lists goal scorers "49' MACHIS", "F. MENDY", and "BENZEMA" with a match timer at "89:57", alongside logos for "WINAMAX", "LaLiga Santander", and "CAJA RURAL GRANADA". The scene then cuts to a close-up of a man with short hair wearing a light-colored polo shirt. He is speaking directly to the camera against a blurred stadium background. Yellow and white subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, reading "¡Hola! Estoy muy contento por" and "Hello! I'm really happy because". Across the final sequence of frames, the man continues to speak, with his facial expressions and mouth movements changing as he addresses the viewer.
